exact_quote: lifts: 4 ... Quads 1 ... base 6,463' ... peak 6,812' ... Average Snowfall 150" ... open December 5, 2025 ... close April 4, 2026 ... snow tubing on the longest lanes in Utah ... Salt Lake International Airport ... 27 MILES
notes: Woodward Park City is a day-use action sports campus (no on-mountain lodging — Moose Management is off-site Park City vacation rentals). Lift count of 4 includes 1 high-speed quad plus surface lifts. Formerly Gorgoza Park tubing hill before POWDR rebrand. Snowmaking% not published; site is largely snowmaking-dependent.

exact_quote: 19 lifts transport the guests ... late November - mid April ... The Yellowstone Club is the largest and most exclusive private ski club in the world ... If you purchase a house (starting at US$2.1 million) in the 13,400-acre area
notes: Private members-only residential ski club; on-mountain lodging is members' privately-owned homes within the 13,400-acre property. Snowfall 300 in and 9,860 ft summit / 7,160 ft base elevation per discoveringmontana.com and yellowstoneclub.com/ski. BZN distance 60 mi per rome2rio. Sources cite 21 lifts (Discovering Montana) vs 19 (skiresort.info); chose 19 as the more conservative documented figure. Nordic/cross-country confirmed via Sunnyside Nordic Trail on Andesite Mountain. Tubing/snowmaking/backcountry/trail map/webcam not publicly published (private club).
